sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personnel_controlfiles_t (personnelid, type, filename, attachment_id, addoperator, addtime, updateoperator, updatetime, memo, validflag) VALUES ($personnelid$, '$type$', '$filename$', '$attachment_id$', '$addoperator$', '$addtime$', '$updateoperator$', '$updatetime$', '$memo$', 1)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_controlfiles_t SET type = $type$, filename = '$filename$', attachment_id = $attachment_id$, updateoperator = '$updateoperator$', updatetime = '$updatetime$', memo = '$memo$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_personnel_controlfiles_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator = '$updateoperator$', updatetime = '$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM p_personnel_controlfiles_t WHERE id = $id$ AND validflag = 1
SELECT * FROM p_personnel_controlfiles_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$ AND validflag = 1
SELECT * FROM p_personnel_controlfiles_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$ AND validflag = 1 AND type = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p_personnel_controlfiles_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$ AND validflag = 1 AND type = 1
SELECT * FROM p_personnel_controlfiles_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$ AND validflag = 1 AND type = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p_personnel_controlfiles_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$ AND validflag = 1 AND type = 2
